name: TV Logos
description: Automatically enriches channel logos from the open-source tv-logo/tv-logos repository via the jsDelivr CDN.

settings.label: GitHub Repository (owner/repo)
settings.helper_text: GitHub repository for logo files. Change to use a fork, e.g. your-username/tv-logos.

settings.label: Default Playlist(s)
settings.helper_text: Playlists to enrich automatically after each sync. Leave empty to disable automatic enrichment.

settings.label: Country Code (e.g. us, gb, de, fr)
Overwrite channels that already have a logo
Match cache TTL in days (0 = never expire)
Normalize channel names before matching
settings.helper_text: Enable to clean up channel names before logo matching. Configure individual rules below.

settings.label: Strip unicode special characters (², ³, ʀᴀᴡ, etc.)
settings.helper_text: Remove superscripts, subscripts, and small-caps unicode characters.

settings.label: Strip 'raw' from quality tags (HDraw → HD)
settings.helper_text: Remove 'raw' suffix from quality indicators like HDraw, FHDraw, UHDraw.

settings.label: Strip provider-specific info (Cable, Sat, etc.)
settings.helper_text: Remove provider identifiers like Cable, Sat, Kabel that are not part of the channel name.

settings.label: Strip extra quality descriptors (Low, FHD+, etc.)
settings.helper_text: Remove extra quality descriptors like Low, Plus (when after a quality tag), FHD+.

settings.label: Custom normalization patterns (one regex per line)
settings.helper_text: Advanced: custom regex patterns to remove from channel names. One pattern per line, applied in order.

fields.label: Overwrite channels that already have a logo
